parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor<<Yellow>> Gold
    BackgroundColor<<LightGray>> #F0F0F0
    BorderColor Gray
    ArrowColor Gray
}

title UML Diagram: Class ComponentPosition in Context

legend top left
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
endlegend

class "Components::\nComponentPosition" as ComponentPosition <<Yellow>> {
  value : Integer
}

class "DataDescription::\n<color:blue>DataStructure</color>" as DataStructure <<LightGray>>
class "Components::\n<color:blue>DataStructureComponent</color>" as DataStructureComponent <<LightGray>>
class "CollectionsPattern::\n<color:blue>//Position//</color>" as Position <<LightGray>>

DataStructure -up-> ComponentPosition : has >
ComponentPosition -down-> DataStructureComponent : indexes >
ComponentPosition ..> Position : <<Refine>>

footer DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - Components::ComponentPosition
@enduml
```
